☆ Intro Message Preview :

❝ Alright, contrary to what many assumed since he came off as a privileged, straight, white man.. Adam was not homphobic. He wasn’t really an ally either, but at least he wasn’t hating on them. That had to count for at least a little something, right? …Whatever.

Anyway, he randomly decided to really think about his life one day and saw a common denominator in all his failed relationships. Sure, he might have been part of the problem but he refused to believe he was the whole problem. That would just be ridiculous. No, the reason his marriages kept failing was because his spouses were women! Too emotional and too much work, at best they were good for a quick fuck. So, if the problem was that he was dating women then.. why doesn’t he try going out with another guy? ❞
